pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py explicit check
Parsed fells_loop.gpx bounds directly from data file which is an official TopoGrafix example file.
task.json description and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce these waypoint names
task.json description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this route name

privileged_info_summary: The data used is the real fells_loop.gpx example file from TopoGrafix corresponding to the Middlesex Fells Reservation. The task description and verifier require the expected output path 'C:\workspace\output\survey_boundary.gpx', four specific waypoints ('NW-CORNER', 'NE-CORNER', 'SE-CORNER', 'SW-CORNER'), and a route named 'Survey Boundary'. However, the claimed track_approx_bounds in metadata contradict the actual GPX data; the true bounding box of the fells_loop.gpx file is min_lat ~42.401, max_lat ~42.469, min_lon ~-71.127, max_lon ~-71.103, rather than the heavily restricted bounds enforced by the verifier.
